question: How do I create a new project in Odoo Project?
expected_answer: Go to Project > Projects > New. Enter the project name, select a project manager (user_id), set visibility (portal/employees/followers), configure stages, and save. Optionally enable timesheets, forecasts, and milestones in the project settings.

question: What is the difference between project visibility options: portal, employees, and followers?
expected_answer: Portal allows portal users and customers to see the project. Employees makes the project visible to all internal users. Followers restricts visibility to project followers and collaborators only.

question: How do I add tasks to a project and assign them?
expected_answer: Open the project kanban view, click the plus icon on a stage, enter the task name, and press Enter. Open the task form and set Assignees (user_ids), Deadline (date_deadline), Priority, Tags, and Planned Hours.

question: How do timesheets work in Odoo Project?
expected_answer: With hr_timesheet installed, each task and project can record timesheets via account.analytic.line. Employees log hours against tasks. Effective hours are summed, remaining_hours are recalculated, and costs can be analyzed if employee timesheet costs are set.

question: What are kanban states in tasks and how are they used?
expected_answer: Kanban state (kanban_state) indicates task progress within a stage: normal (default), done (green, ready to move forward), blocked (red, impediment). It is independent of the stage and helps signal readiness or blockers.

question: How can I track project profitability?
expected_answer: Install sale_timesheet (Enterprise). Link the project or task to a sales order line. Billable timesheets generate revenue while employee timesheet costs represent cost. Use the Project Profitability report to review margin.

question: How do I set up resource forecasting for my projects?
expected_answer: Install project_forecast (Enterprise). Enable allow_forecast on the project. Create forecast records assigning employees or roles to tasks/projects over date ranges. Use the Gantt and planning views to compare capacity versus planned work.

question: How do I share a project with external customers?
expected_answer: Set privacy_visibility to 'portal'. Add the customer as a project collaborator (project.collaborator) or follower with appropriate access level (read/comment/edit). The customer can then access the project through the Odoo portal.

question: What are project milestones and how are they used?
expected_answer: Milestones (project.milestone) are target dates for major deliverables. Tasks can be linked to a milestone via milestone_id. When all linked tasks are done, the milestone can be marked as reached. They are used in Gantt and reporting.

question: How do I configure automated emails when a task reaches a stage?
expected_answer: Edit the project stage (project.task.type) and set the Mail Template (mail_template_id). When any task is moved to that stage, Odoo will automatically send the configured email to followers.
